name: Datadog
description: Cloud monitoring and analytics platform for infrastructure, APM, logs, and security observability.

name: New Relic
description: Full-stack observability platform with APM, infrastructure monitoring, and distributed tracing.

name: Dynatrace
description: AI-powered software intelligence platform for full-stack monitoring and automated root cause analysis.

name: AppSignal
description: Application monitoring for Ruby, Elixir, Node.js, and Python with error tracking and metrics.

name: Scout APM
description: Application performance monitoring tool focused on developer-friendly insights for web apps.

name: Elastic APM
description: Application performance monitoring built on the Elastic Stack for tracing and error correlation.

name: Sentry
description: Application monitoring platform for error tracking, performance monitoring, and session replay.

name: Bugsnag
description: Error monitoring and stability management platform for web, mobile, and server applications.

name: Rollbar
description: Real-time error tracking and debugging platform with automatic grouping and prioritization.

name: Airbrake
description: Error monitoring service that captures exceptions and provides performance insights for applications.

name: Honeybadger
description: Exception monitoring, uptime checks, and cron job monitoring for web developers in one platform.

name: LogRocket
description: Frontend monitoring platform with session replay, error tracking, and product analytics.

name: Papertrail
description: Cloud-hosted log management service for aggregating, searching, and alerting on application logs.

name: Logtail (Better Stack)
description: Structured log management platform with SQL-compatible querying and real-time tail features.

name: Axiom
description: Cloud-native log management and analytics platform with unlimited data retention and fast queries.

name: Loki
description: Horizontally-scalable log aggregation system by Grafana Labs inspired by Prometheus design.

name: Fluentd
description: Open-source data collector for unified logging layer across multiple sources and destinations.

name: Splunk
description: Enterprise platform for searching, monitoring, and analyzing machine-generated big data via logs.

name: Graylog
description: Open-source log management platform for collecting, indexing, and analyzing log data centrally.

name: Better Uptime
description: Uptime monitoring, status pages, and incident management in one modern platform.

name: UptimeRobot
description: Free website monitoring service checking uptime every five minutes with alert notifications.

name: Pingdom
description: Website performance and uptime monitoring service with real user monitoring and alerting.

name: StatusCake
description: Website monitoring platform offering uptime, page speed, and SSL certificate checks.

name: Checkly
description: Monitoring-as-code platform for API endpoints and browser-based E2E testing in CI/CD pipelines.

name: Uptime Kuma
description: Self-hosted, open-source monitoring tool with a beautiful UI for tracking website uptime.

name: Prometheus
description: Open-source monitoring and alerting toolkit for recording real-time metrics in a time-series database.

name: Grafana
description: Open-source visualization and analytics platform for monitoring metrics from multiple data sources.

name: Zabbix
description: Open-source enterprise monitoring solution for networks, servers, cloud services, and applications.

name: Nagios
description: Industry-standard open-source monitoring system for IT infrastructure and network services.

name: Icinga
description: Open-source monitoring system for checking availability of network resources and notifying on issues.

name: Netdata
description: Open-source real-time infrastructure monitoring with per-second granularity and zero configuration.

name: Telegraf
description: Plugin-driven server agent for collecting and reporting metrics from systems, databases, and IoT.

name: InfluxDB
description: Open-source time series database for high-performance storage and querying of metrics data.

name: Statuspage
description: Atlassian's hosted status page service for communicating real-time system status to users.

name: Instatus
description: Fast, beautiful status page service with integrations for monitoring tools and incident management.

name: Cachet
description: Open-source status page system for communicating downtime and system status to stakeholders.

name: Upptime
description: Open-source uptime monitor and status page powered entirely by GitHub Actions and Issues.

name: PagerDuty
description: Incident management platform for real-time alerts, on-call scheduling, and response orchestration.

name: Opsgenie
description: Atlassian's alerting and on-call management tool for routing alerts to the right team members.

name: Incident.io
description: Incident management platform built on Slack for declaring, managing, and learning from incidents.

name: FireHydrant
description: Incident management platform that automates workflows for faster response and resolution.

name: Rootly
description: Incident management tool built in Slack for automating on-call, response, and retrospectives.

name: VictorOps (Splunk On-Call)
description: Incident management and on-call scheduling tool for DevOps teams now part of Splunk.

name: Jaeger
description: Open-source distributed tracing system for monitoring microservice-based architectures.

name: Zipkin
description: Open-source distributed tracing system for gathering timing data across microservice calls.

name: OpenTelemetry
description: Open-source observability framework for generating, collecting, and exporting telemetry data.

name: Lightstep (ServiceNow)
description: Observability platform for distributed systems with change intelligence and trace analytics.

name: Honeycomb
description: Observability platform for debugging complex systems using high-cardinality event data.

name: Speedcurve
description: Web performance monitoring tool for tracking Core Web Vitals and front-end loading speed.

name: WebPageTest
description: Open-source website performance testing tool with waterfall analysis and filmstrip comparison.

name: Calibre
description: Web performance monitoring platform for tracking Core Web Vitals and performance budgets.

name: DebugBear
description: Website speed monitoring tool tracking Lighthouse scores and Core Web Vitals over time.

name: Cronitor
description: Monitoring platform for cron jobs, background tasks, and scheduled pipelines with alerting.

name: Healthchecks.io
description: Open-source cron job monitoring service that alerts when scheduled tasks fail to run.

name: SigNoz
description: Open-source APM and observability platform as an alternative to Datadog built on OpenTelemetry.

name: Highlight.io
description: Open-source fullstack monitoring with session replay, error monitoring, and log search.

name: Grafana Cloud
description: Managed observability stack with Grafana, Prometheus, Loki, and Tempo for metrics and traces.

name: Thanos
description: Open-source highly available Prometheus setup with long-term storage and global query view.
